name: 串烤BBQ拼盤 BBQ Skewer Platter
desc: 肋眼, 雞腿及雙菇各2串,大蝦1隻。1串15厘米。牛肉原產地：美國。Rib eye, chicken drumstick and assorted mushroom 2 skewers each. 15cm per skewer and 1 large shrimp.

name: 工人放飯 Homemade Tomato Spices Beef with Turmeric Rice
desc:
自製蕃茄香料牛肉, 薑黃飯, 帕瑪森起司, 時蔬及太陽蛋。牛肉原產地：美國
Homemade tomato spices beef, turmeric rice, parmesan cheese, seasonal vegetable, and sunny-side up egg.

name: 黑咖手撕豬古巴三明治 Pulled Pork Cuban Sandwich with Special Black Coffee Sauce
desc:
內含烘烤地瓜及沙拉。精選台灣梅花豬, 軟法麵包塗蜂蜜芥末, 夾手撕豬, 生菜, 番茄, 馬茲瑞拉起司及特製黑咖啡醬。豬肉原產地：台灣
Served with baked sweet potato and salad. Selected Taiwanese pork blade shoulder, soft French bread with honey mustard sauce, pulled pork, lettuce, tomato, mozzarella cheese, and special black coffee sauce.

name: 燻烤豬肋排 Smoked Pork Rib
desc:
內含烘烤地瓜及沙拉。精選豬肋排, 海鹽混合多種香料及自製BBQ烤肉醬。豬肉原產地：台灣
Served with baked sweet potato and salad. Selected pork rib, sea salt mixes assorted spices, and bbq sauce.

name: 墨西哥臘腸披薩 Mexican Sausage Pizza
desc:
自製蕃茄醬, 墨西哥辣椒, 伊比利豬臘腸及起司。豬肉原產地：西班牙
Homemade tomato sauce, jalapeno, Iberian pork sausage, and cheese.

name: 炸物拼盤 Deep-Fried Platter
desc:
薯條, 洋蔥圈，雞米花及雞翅。
French fries, onion ring, and chicken wing.

name: 凱薩沙拉 Caesar Salad
desc:
清脆蔬菜, 帕瑪森起司, 脆皮法國麵包片, 烤培根, 葡萄乾及濃郁自製凱薩醬。豬肉原產地：加拿大、荷蘭、台灣。
Vegetable, parmesan cheese, crispy French sliced bread, grilled bacon, raisin, and rich homemade caesar sauce.

name: 雞肉沙拉 Chicken Salad
desc:
雞胸肉, 綜合生菜葉, 油漬番茄, 紅洋蔥及特製香甜醬。
Chicken breast, assorted lettuce, marinated tomato, red onion, and special sweet sauce.

name: 燻鮭魚海鮮油醋沙拉 smoked salmon seafoodSalad
desc:
菲力牛肉, 綜合生菜葉, 油漬番茄, 紅洋蔥及巴薩米克油醋醬。牛肉原產地：紐西蘭。
Chicken breast, assorted lettuce, marinated tomato, red onion, and balsamic oil vinegar.

name: 手撕豬肉玉米片 Pulled Pork with Nachos
desc:
白玉米片搭配自製烘烤手撕豬肉, 熱熔雙色切達起司絲, 帕瑪森起司及特調芥末醬。豬肉原產地：台灣。
Tostitos with homemade roasted pulled pork, mixed shredded cheddar cheese, parmesan cheese, and special mustard sauce.

name: 悶烤牛胸古巴三明治 Roasted Beef Breast Cuban Sandwich
desc:
內含烘烤地瓜及沙拉。美國和牛前胸肉, 軟法麵包塗蜂蜜芥末, 夾切片牛胸, 生菜, 番茄, 馬茲瑞拉起司及特製BBQ醬。牛肉原產地：美國。
Served with baked sweet potato and salad. American wagyu beef breast, soft French bread with honey mustard sauce, sliced beef breast, lettuce, tomato, mozzarella cheese, and special bbq sauce.

name: 醬烤雞胸古巴三明治 Roasted Chicken Breast Cuban Sandwich
desc:
內含烘烤地瓜及沙拉。溫體雞胸, 軟法麵包塗蜂蜜芥末, 雞胸肉片, 生菜, 番茄及馬茲瑞拉起司。
Served with baked sweet potato and salad. Fresh chicken breast, soft French bread with honey mustard sauce, sliced chicken breast, lettuce, tomato, and mozzarella cheese.

name: 工頭開飯 Taiwanese Pork Blade Shoulder with Turmeric Rice
category: 角窩鍋飯 Signature Pot Rice
desc:
精選台灣梅花豬, 綜合菇類, 紅洋蔥, 醃黃瓜拌炒, 薑黃飯, 帕瑪森起司及魷魚。豬肉原產地：台灣。
Selected Taiwanese pork blade shoulder, assorted mushroom, red onion, marinated cucumber, turmeric rice, parmesan cheese, and squid.

name: 加州海鮮披薩 California Seafood Pizza
desc:
自製蕃茄醬, 魷魚, 蝦仁, 黑橄欖, 洋菇及起司。
Homemade tomato sauce, squid, shrimp, black olive, mushroom, and cheese.

name: 夏威夷披薩 Hawaii Pizza
desc:
自製蕃茄醬, 鳳梨, 特選火腿及起司。豬肉原產地：加拿大、台灣
Homemade tomato sauce, pineapple, selected ham, and cheese.

name: 加州風味雞腿排 California Chicken Thigh
desc:
內含烘烤地瓜。特選溫體去骨雞腿, 紅椒粉及多種香料。
Served with baked sweet potato. Selected fresh boneless chicken drumstick, paprika, and mixed assorted spices.

name: 挪威鮭魚排
desc: 挪威進口鮭魚排，以海鹽煎烤，搭配蜂蜜芥茉醬，內附烘烤地瓜和時蔬。
